data.title: Bitcoin chart signals ‘decisive price move’ in coming weeks: Analyst
data.description:
Bitcoin may see a “decisive price move” in the near term, and while short-term volatility may continue, the long-term view “remains positive,” say analysts.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-chart-signals-decisive-price-move-coming-macro-economic-conditions-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Administration Agrees to Temporarily Limit DOGE’s Access to Treasury Payment Systems
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - U.S. Department of Justice prosecutors have agreed to temporarily restrict Musk's "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE) staff from accessing information in the Treasury Department's payment system. 
Earlier, a group of union members and retirees sued the Treasury Department, alleging that providing DOGE with access to the federal government's vast payment system and personal data information stored therein violated federal privacy laws. 
The Trump administration filed a motion on Wednesday night seeking to sign a proposed order detailing the agreed terms. The proposed order states that "the defendant will not provide any access to payment records or payment systems maintained by the U.S. Fiscal Service or its internal agencies." The order allows exceptions, allowing two special government employees within the Treasury Department (Tom Kraus and Marco Elez) to access these records "on demand" when performing their duties, but this access is limited to "read-only". (Jin Shi)

data.title: Flow Traders, QCP, and GSR deposited a total of 57.62 million stablecoins to CEX in the past 24 hours
Brazilian lawmakers propose new draft bill to allow Brazilian funds to invest in cryptocurrencies
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Brazilian Congressman Adriana Ventura submitted a new draft bill proposing to approve Brazilian funds to invest in cryptocurrencies and purchase Bitcoin. The bill has been uploaded to the official website of the Brazilian Congress.
Ventura said that the proposal is aimed at meeting the growing demand and interest of Brazilian investment funds in cryptocurrencies. "This measure may contribute to financial innovation, encourage the industry to develop more complex products, and formulate investment strategies that include crypto assets. It will also encourage internal competition and promote creativity in the financial sector."
She added that the measure will "provide a regulated and safe environment," which will enable funds to expand the diversification of their portfolios.

data.title: Brazilian Lawmaker Proposes Bill to Allow Crypto Investments by Funds
data.description: According to Odaily, Brazilian lawmaker Adriana Ventura has introduced a new bill proposing the authorization of Brazilian funds to invest in cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin. The draft has been uploaded to the official website of the Brazilian Parliament. Ventura stated that the proposal aims to address the growing demand and interest in cryptocurrencies among Brazilian investment funds. She emphasized that this measure could foster financial innovation and encourage the development of more sophisticated products within the industry. The bill intends to establish investment strategies that include crypto assets, promote internal competition, and enhance creativity in the financial sector. Ventura added that the measure would provide a regulated and secure environment, enabling funds to diversify their investment portfolios.

data.title: Yu Xian: When phishing gangs that issue CAs focus on manipulating emotions to conduct rugby, technology is not the key point
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Slow Mist Yuxian Yu X said in a post: "What is the difference between the previous Crypto phishing gangs (such as Inferno/Angel/Monkey/Pink and other Crypto Drainers) and the current CA-issuing phishing gangs?
Crypto Drainers really show off their skills very well, not only in the ETH ecosystem, but also for Solana, BTC, etc. Many technical people are easily stuck in the analysis of these skills. Inversely, wallets, security plug-ins and security teams have made huge security investments in this regard.
Nowadays, those who issue CAs are almost all just emotional masters. Technology is not the key point. CA launch and trading platforms are too mature on Solana, so they can just borrow them.
There is another very different detail:
Crypto Drainers are the ones who advertise to the world that someone's huge phishing is done by themselves, in order to attract more operating gangs to join and spread these Drainers, and profit dividends, such as the operating gangs directly withdrawing 80%-90%, very generous. Therefore, the relevant key wallet addresses are kept unchanged as much as possible, and the money laundering methods are also mature, so as to avoid being caught as much as possible.
For those who issue CA, the funds on the chain will try to avoid intersections as much as possible. The reason is also very simple. We hope that more people will rush in "with confidence" and find the right time to play rugby. According to our analysis, there is a phenomenon that has been exposed. Regardless of whether it is true or not, many people will definitely rush in at the first time when the emotions are in place, because they are betting that they can run fast, beat the fishing gang rugby, and beat the people who rush in later. PVP plays with information asymmetry in this way.
Then:
Crypto Drainers occasionally catch big fish, super big fish; issuing CA may only make a profit of about 100 SOL, but the volume is large, and there are many ways to issue it, such as black X number method, imitation airdrop method, subdivided hot spot packaging method, etc., which is playing with emotional value. Of course, Crypto Drainers are also very good at playing with emotional value. How many people are caught because of fomo Going to claim the airdrop caused it.
Remember, this is a dark forest. Once your emotions are manipulated, the chance of failure will be very high. It’s also good to step on small pits, which will leave a deep impression. ”

data.title: The total market value of stablecoins exceeded US$222 billion, setting a new record, and the market value of USDC exceeded US$55 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News DefiLlama data shows that the total market value of stablecoins has exceeded 222 billion US dollars, and is currently 222.205 billion US dollars, setting a new record high; it has increased by about 2.6% in the past week, and USDT's market share has dropped to 63.85%.
In addition, the market value of USDC has reached 55.325 billion US dollars, an increase of 21.1% in the past 30 days.

data.title: Swedish Digital Asset Management Firm Virtune Launches Avalanche and Cardano ETPs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - Swedish compliant digital asset management company Virtune announced the listing of two cryptocurrency-related ETPs on Nasdaq Helsinki, namely Virtune Avalanche ETP and Virtune Staked Cardano ETP.
Virtune recently launched Finland's first five cryptocurrency ETPs on Nasdaq Helsinki, including Virtune Bitcoin ETP, Virtune Staked Ethereum ETP, Virtune Staked Solana ETP, Virtune XRP ETP and Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP.
